welcomeSection.manageSocialMedia: Manage Your Social Media Automatically with Postmatic.

checkout.paymentSuccessDescription: Thank you! Your payment has been processed successfully.

virtualAccount.title: How to make payment:
virtualAccount.step1: Copy the Virtual Account number above by pressing the copy button.
virtualAccount.step2: Open the mobile banking or ATM application of your bank.
virtualAccount.step4: Enter the Virtual Account number that has been copied.
virtualAccount.step5: Check the payment details and confirm.
virtualAccount.step6: Enter the PIN/OTP to complete the payment.
virtualAccount.note: The payment will be processed automatically after the transfer is successful. Make sure the nominal is according to the total.

qris.title: How to pay with QRIS:
qris.step1: Open the e-wallet/bank application (GoPay, OVO, ShopeePay, DANA, BCA Mobile, etc.).
qris.step3: Point the camera to the QR on the screen.
qris.step4: Check the payment details and confirm.
qris.step5: Confirm the payment using the PIN/biometric.
qris.step6: Return to this page and press "Check Payment Status".
qris.note: The QR will expire according to the time shown. If the scan fails, download the QR and scan from the gallery.

redirect.title: How to continue payment:
redirect.step2: If it doesn't open, make sure the e-wallet application is installed and try again.
redirect.step3: Follow the instructions in the application until the payment is successful.
redirect.step4: Return to this page and press "Check Payment Status".
redirect.note: Some browsers may block deeplinks. If needed, copy the link and paste it in the address bar of the browser/app that supports it.

newBusinessEntry.title: Business Knowledge
newBusinessEntry.subtitle: Choose how you want to build your first business profile. Start manually or let AI draft the basics from a website link.
newBusinessEntry.manualDescription: Fill out the full business, product, and role knowledge form yourself.
newBusinessEntry.websiteDescription: Use your website to automatically create a draft of your business knowledge

newBusinessWebsite.title: Enter your website
newBusinessWebsite.subtitle: We'll scan the link and generate a draft of your business knowledge so you can refine it before continuing.
newBusinessWebsite.loadingSubtitle: This dummy flow simulates AI research and website extraction before filling your business profile.
newBusinessWebsite.loadingStep1: Reading your homepage and positioning statement
newBusinessWebsite.loadingStep2: Detecting brand colors, tone, and audience clues
newBusinessWebsite.loadingStep3: Building a structured business knowledge draft
newBusinessWebsite.loadingFootnote: This demo is frontend only and does not call a real analyzer yet.
newBusinessWebsite.resultSubtitle: Review the generated fields below. This screen is intentionally larger than the reference so the form feels usable, not zoomed out.
newBusinessWebsite.insight1: The draft leans toward a clean, modern, high-trust brand direction.
newBusinessWebsite.insight2: Audience cues suggest decision makers looking for efficient digital growth.
newBusinessWebsite.insight3: Content should balance product clarity, social proof, and practical next steps.
newBusinessWebsite.sourceDescription: Draft generated from this website link
newBusinessWebsite.sampleDescription: A business that helps brands automate content workflows, publish consistently, and turn business knowledge into usable campaign inputs.
newBusinessWebsite.sampleUniqueSellingPoint: Fast setup, AI-assisted planning, and practical workflows that make content production easier for lean teams.
newBusinessWebsite.sampleVisionMission: Help modern businesses create clearer, faster, and more consistent brand communication with AI-powered systems.
newBusinessWebsite.sampleTargetAudience: SMEs, founders, and marketing teams that want a faster way to build reliable social media output.
newBusinessWebsite.sampleContentTone: Confident, clear, modern, and educational with a strong product-led voice.
newBusinessWebsite.sampleCallToAction: Start with your current website, review the draft, and continue refining your business profile.
